name: Ray LaVoy's Landscaping

seoDescription: Ray LaVoy's Landscaping is a family design-build landscaper in Sonoma — pond-less waterfalls, paver patios, rock walls, planting, and water-conscious

sections.heading: Artisan gardens, built to last
body: Ray LaVoy's Landscaping is a family design-build operation based in Sonoma, where founder Ray LaVoy brings knowledge, integrity, and craftsmanship to water-conscious landscapes and artisan gardens. Ray, his dad, and their team have worked the Sonoma Valley, Boyes Hot Springs, and Glen Ellen areas for decades.

The work is hands-on and design-led: pond-less waterfalls and water features, paver patios, rock and retaining walls, planting, and efficient irrigation, plus practical services like defensible-space management and material delivery. It's the kind of careful, water-wise landscaping that fits Sonoma's climate and lasts.
highlights: Decades of design-build landscaping across Sonoma Valley
Family-run — Ray, his dad, and their team

items.title: Landscape Design & Build
items.description: Full design-and-build landscaping, from concept to a finished, planted garden.

items.title: Pond-Less Waterfalls & Water Features
items.description: A specialty — pond-less waterfalls and water features that bring sound and movement without the upkeep.

items.title: Paver Patios
items.description: Paver patios and pathways that shape how you live in and move through the garden.

items.title: Rock & Retaining Walls
items.description: Stone and retaining walls that hold a slope and define a space, built to last.

items.title: Planting & Water-Wise Irrigation
items.description: Climate-appropriate planting paired with efficient, water-conscious irrigation.

items.title: Defensible Space & Delivery
items.description: Defensible-space management plus plant, tree, soil, and mulch delivery and yard-debris hauling.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Ray LaVoy's Landscaping and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: They do excellent work — they've been in business in the Sonoma, Boyes Hot Springs, and Glen Ellen areas for decades, with water-feature expertise as a specialty.
items.author: Verified Nextdoor recommendation · Sonoma

sections.heading: Work with Ray LaVoy's Landscaping
sections.body: Find us at 943 Donald St, Sonoma, CA 95476. Call (707) 287-6800 — we’re glad to help.
